docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,176.09 FILED BY LEE, CHRISTINA LEE, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT BONURA PLUS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, CHRISTINA LEE, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT BONURA PLUS INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-11-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-11-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS CHRISTINA LEE AND PAUL LEE ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT BONURA PLUS INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2025 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-26-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BONURA PLUS INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, CHRISTINA LEE, PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BONURA PLUS INC. $1,910.98 PRINCIPAL, $73.60 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,984.58 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
